title: XRAY or COO: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: Investors looking for stocks in the Medical - Dental Supplies sector might want to consider either Dentsply International (XRAY) or The Cooper Companies (COO). But which of these two stocks is more attractive to value investors?

title: Reasons to Retain The Cooper Companies (COO) in Your Portfolio
text: The Cooper Companies (COO) benefits from strength in its business segments. Its acquisitions are likely to drive the top line.
